$comment: Bonded familiars (design doc §7): the rare exception to the Migration reset — earned, never bought. Each bond source grants exactly one permanent companion; bonds are role-locked (a carrier bonds as a carrier), work any zone, and sit outside the gift count and its cost curve. Earned state is DERIVED from the source (Museum donations and Almanac nodes both survive Migration), so a bond crosses with you for free. MVP: two bondable — more by 1.1.
